testcase.name: Checkout Flow › TC-201: Complete checkout with valid data
Checkout Flow › TC-202: Order confirmation message displayed
Checkout Flow › TC-203: Summary page shows order items
Checkout Flow › TC-204: Summary page displays total price
Checkout Flow › TC-205: Summary page displays tax
Checkout Flow › TC-206: Missing first name validation
Checkout Flow › TC-207: Missing last name validation
Checkout Flow › TC-208: Missing postal code validation
Checkout Flow › TC-209: Cancel checkout returns to cart
Checkout Flow › TC-210: Checkout form fields are fillable
Cart to Checkout › TC-211: Checkout button available with items in cart
Cart to Checkout › TC-212: Checkout button disabled when cart is empty
Cart to Checkout › TC-213: Continue shopping button returns to inventory
Cart to Checkout › TC-214: Back to products from confirmation page
Multiple Items Checkout › TC-215: Checkout with multiple items
Multiple Items Checkout › TC-216: Calculate total with multiple items
Checkout Edge Cases › TC-217: Special characters in name fields
Checkout Edge Cases › TC-218: Very long postal code
Complete User Journey › TC-301: Complete purchase flow - Login to Order Completion
Complete User Journey › TC-302: Browse products without purchase
Complete User Journey › TC-303: Add to cart, modify, and checkout
Complete User Journey › TC-304: Sort products and add to cart

failure.message: e2e.spec.js:149:7 TC-304: Sort products and add to cart

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › e2e.spec.js:149:7 › Complete User Journey › TC-304: Sort products and add to cart ───
TimeoutError: page.selectOption: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('[data-test="product_sort_container"]')
at ..\pages\BasePage.js:232
